rule: Roll 1d6 per extra success beyond the first (2 successes = 1 roll, 3 = 2 rolls, etc.) on the table matching the damage type.

Impact.desc: Bone-crushing force from blunt weapons. Shatters defenses and leaves foes dazed.

Piercing.desc: Sharp and precise - penetrates armor and targets vital points.

Slashing.desc: Sweeping cuts leave open wounds and bleeding gashes.

Acid.desc: Corrosive substances eat through armor and flesh alike.

Eclipse.desc: Shadow and dark magic drain life and light.

Fire.desc: Intense heat burns everything - fireballs, lava, infernos.

Fluid.desc: Water, blood, oil - can overwhelm and suffocate.

Ice.desc: Biting cold freezes and numbs - can encase enemies in frost.

Lightning.desc: Electricity arcs with shocking speed and precision.

Solar.desc: Brilliant radiance smites the unholy and cleanses corruption.

Thunder.desc: Concussive booms shake earth and shatter eardrums.

Toxic.desc: Poison and radiation corrupt from within - slow and insidious.

Nature.desc: Primal forces - vines, insects, relentless wind and rain.

Psychic.desc: Bypasses physical defenses to inflict mental torment.

Vozian.desc: Born from decay and chaos - spreads rot and corrupting disorder.

Elemental.desc: Mixed elemental energy - roll twice on a random elemental table.

Healing.desc: Restores wounds and revitalizes. Cannot cure conditions without special intervention.
